title: Generic processor provider for INGV pygeoapi process plugins
description: Lightweight generic processor provider acting as an execution service for the INGV pygeoapi processing platform. It receives execution requests from pygeoapi process plugins, executes configured scientific command-line programs, and returns execution status and results. See README.md for detailed architecture and usage documentation.

creators.name: Martinelli, Francesco
creators.affiliation: Istituto Nazionale di Geofisica e Vulcanologia (INGV)
